text:
## Assessment: APPROVED

All five acceptance criteria pass:

- ProofWidgets is pinned and the frontend builds.
- PRD-0010 parity remains intact.
- Exact graph JSON and numerical curve tests pass.
- Directed arrowheads remain visible.
- Pure builders contain no simulation or IO.
- Cursor registration and manual instructions are complete.
- Root and frontend dependency documentation is consistent.

```json
{"assessment":"APPROVED","blockingIssues":[],"summary":"All PRD 0011 criteria pass: ProofWidgets is pinned, both pure widgets are registered on declaration tokens, exact graph JSON and numerical curve tests pass, directed arrows remain visible, PRD-0010 parity is preserved, and dependency/manual documentation is consistent."}
```
